narrative: Hormuz tensions and Iran war damage warnings drive a geopolitical risk premium as crude surges toward $100 — USD/JPY firms to 156.73, supported by 300bp Fed-BoJ carry; gold higher +0.45%; equities -0.38%; DXY +0.10%; VIX 17.4. NZD/CAD bilateral divergence (+1.15% spread) reflects NZD outperformance (+0.61% avg) vs CAD weakness (-0.54% avg). Watch RBNZ meeting May 27 for further NZD directional cues.
